title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Instamojo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Instamojo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Instamojo are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Instamojo:
Instamojo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Instamojo!
